tool.name: detect_capabilities
tool.description:
Probe the sandbox for installed pentest tooling and return the manifest.
Checks ~60 common tools (nmap, sqlmap, msfconsole, hashcat, trufflehog, sliver-client, slither, trivy, nuclei, ffuf, arjun, gitleaks, semgrep, commix, dalfox, wpscan, etc.) and returns what's actually installed with versions.
Result is cached per-process. Call once at scan start, then reference manifest before using tools. Tools listed in `missing` are NOT available — don't try to call them.
